elements.text: Your sibling has not been tested for HD. They tell you that they think they have been experiencing some symptoms lately, and they have decided to undergo genetic testing. As you think about what the results could mean for your sibling, you feel...

elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
